PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -or $_.CPU -gt 50 } | Select-Object Id, StartTime, @{N="CPU\(s\)";E={[math]::Round\($_.CPU,1\)}}, @{N="WS\(MB\)";E={[math]::Round\($_.WS/1MB\)}} | Sort-Object 'CPU\(s\)' -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($body = @{ webhook = @{ url="https://sistema-sdr.ridnii.easypanel.host/api/webhooks/whatsapp"; enabled=$true; webhookByEvents=$false; base64=$true; webhookBase64=$true; events=@\("MESSAGES_UPSERT","MESSAGES_UPDATE","MESSAGES_DELETE","SEND_MESSAGE","CONNECTION_UPDATE"\) } } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 -Compress; $h = @{"apikey"="Gabriel@3074"; "Content-Type"="application/json"}; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://sistema-evolution-api.ridnii.easypanel.host/webhook/set/sdr" -Method POST -Headers $h -Body $body -TimeoutSec 30 -UseBasicParsing; "SET: $\($r.StatusCode\)`n$\($r.Content\)" } catch { "ERR: $\(try{$_.ErrorDetails.Message}catch{$_.Exception.Message}\)" })

PowerShell("=== 1. Webhook config atual ==="; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://sistema-evolution-api.ridnii.easypanel.host/webhook/find/sdr" -Headers @{"apikey"="Gabriel@3074"} -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing\).Content; "`n=== 2. VPS root health ==="; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://sistema-sdr.ridnii.easypanel.host/" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 1; "OK $\($r.StatusCode\) — content-type: $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\)" } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell("=== Versão do deploy \(HEAD commit hash via response\) ==="; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://sistema-sdr.ridnii.easypanel.host/api/webhooks/whatsapp" -Method POST -Body '{"event":"ping"}' -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; "VPS resp: $\($r.StatusCode\) | $\($r.Content\)" } catch { "ERR" }; "`n=== Git log recente ==="; git log --oneline -5; "`n=== Está nas VPS env vars o NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL com ridnli ainda? testa com Sincronizar ==="; "\(checar manualmente no Easypanel\)")

PowerShell($auth = [Convert]::ToBase64String\([Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes\("gasalomao:Gabriel@3074"\)\); $h = @{"Authorization"="Basic $auth"; "Content-Type"="application/json"}; $sqlContent = Get-Content -Raw "C:\\Users\\Salomao\\Desktop\\painel-sdr-main\\migrations\\001_multi_tenant.sql"; $body = @{ query = $sqlContent } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://sistema-supabase.ridnii.easypanel.host/api/platform/pg-meta/default/query" -Method POST -Headers $h -Body $body -TimeoutSec 60 -UseBasicParsing; "Migration 001 aplicada: $\($r.StatusCode\)`n$\($r.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(500,$r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { "ERR: $\(try{$_.ErrorDetails.Message.Substring\(0,500\)}catch{$_.Exception.Message}\)" })
